projects.title: Embers Villas & Concierge
projects.description: A premium villa concierge and management website for Thailand, built around private chef services, villa experiences, transfers and curated guest support.

projects.title: Chef Charlie Dorney
projects.description: A personal chef website for villa, yacht and event dining across Thailand, positioning the service around bespoke menus, premium occasions and direct enquiries.

projects.title: Apricity, Mayfair
projects.description: A concept study for a Michelin Green Star restaurant in Mayfair, focused on regenerative hospitality, seasonal British produce, menus, private dining and reservations.

projects.title: Winsome, Manchester
projects.description: A concept study for a Manchester restaurant built around Northern hospitality, thoughtful British cooking, seasonal menus, reservations and private hire.

projects.title: Cedar Manor, Windermere
projects.description: A concept study for a Lake District boutique hotel, built around rooms, afternoon tea, romantic retreats, local hospitality and direct booking pathways.
